title: Cobblemon: SafePastures
description: Make your pastures safe! Decorate to your heart's desires without the worry of your pokemon getting in danger!
body:
# Safe Pastures
Makes pokemon safe to all damage whilst in a pasture.

This mod works on both the client-side and server-side but will only need to be installed server-side to work on servers.

## Features
This mod is simple, it makes sure your pokemon are safe from all damage when roaming in a pasture block. When you are thinking about decorating your pasture with a lava volcano, or cactus in a desert, roaming pokemon will stay safe.

If a damage source has been blocked, the indicator like being frozen / on fire / drowning will be removed along with it's particles.

## Config Options
You can find the config file at: `config/safepastures/safepastures.json`

`preventPokemonDamageInPasture` - true / false

`useBlackList` - Define if a damage blacklist should be used.

`damageSourceBlackList` - List of damage sources. Set to true to allow the damage source type to affect the pokemon

Delete the config file when new mods are added in-case they add a new damage type!

## Dependencies
Cobblemon: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) / [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon/files/5375408)

Fabric-Loader: [Fabric-Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)

Fabric-Api: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) / [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api/files/6321634)

Neoforge: [Neoforge](https://neoforged.net/)
